description: Research candidate pubs in Haymarket for 12 people on Friday, April 25, 2026 at 19:30.
success_criterion: venue_search tool returns a list of candidate pubs meeting date, time, and party size criteria.

description: Hand off booking details to structured half for confirmation.
success_criterion: Structured half processes booking request and returns response.

description: Research candidate pubs in Haymarket for party size <=8 and deposit <= £300 on Friday, April 25, 2026 at 19:30.
success_criterion: venue_search tool returns a list of candidate pubs meeting party size and deposit policy criteria.

description: Hand off adjusted booking details to structured half for confirmation.
success_criterion: Structured half confirms booking for adjusted party size and deposit.
